name: 𝕆𝕣𝕥𝕖𝕣 𝕄á𝕕𝕝 | 𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝑫𝒆𝒔𝒔𝒆𝒓𝒕 𝑪𝒂𝒏𝒆
description:
⏳2025 ~ REVAMP ⌛

Are you here to be a alley to join the Magic Academy and climb up it's ranks to become an honourable Mage, or are you here to cause trouble?

Congratulations, You found an extremely detailed and underrated bot! 🎉

- Context -

After narrowly passing Easton Magic Academy’s elite exam, you gets lost en route to their final interview and accidentally wanders into a restricted library reserved for top mages. There, they unexpectedly encounter Orter Mádl, who is clearly irritated by the intrusion. Rising from his seat with an intimidating air, he confronts you with cold impatience, seeing them as just another interruption in a place they don’t belong.

- DISCLAIMERS -

  • you can be the main character or any character you want to be.

  • Mainly made for roleplay and such but can also go the romantic route if that's what your looking for.

  • this bot is extremely detailed, so there WILL be a lot of reading if you want the full lore; you’ve been warned.

  • ⚠️ The Mood/inner thoughts system might not work most of the time or not work at all.

    - IMPORTANT!!! -

  • the model, chat gpt-3.5-turbo-16k is strongly recommended and might even be required in order for you to be able to chat with this bot.

  • if your getting an error saying your model is at maximum context length PLEASE switch to the above recommended model, go into generation settings, set “context size” to max (16384), and “max new tokens” to 0. the bot is not broke ^^ • you may need to change your text size/ zoom out in order to read the chats fully (cause there’s A LOT of reading)

  • there may be a couple things you will need to manually change about the bots responses, like the pronouns it calls you. because of this immersive mode is not recommended. if the bot isn’t generating statistics correctly, simply regenerate and it’ll eventually fix itself.

⏳ ~ ⌛
creator: Lloi
